law.catch_line: Attempted rape, forcible sodomy, object sexual penetration, aggravated sexual battery, and sexual battery

text.section: An attempt to commit rape, forcible sodomy, or inanimate or animate object sexual penetration shall be punishable as a Class 4 felony.
An attempt to commit aggravated sexual battery shall be a felony punishable as a Class 6 felony.
An attempt to commit sexual battery is a Class 1 misdemeanor.
